colorTemperature.name: Color Temperature
colorTemperature.description: Color temperature of this Output (in Kelvin)

x.name: X Position
x.description: Last applied x position of this output in the global compositor space.
x.description[zh_CN]: 当前输出上次应用到全局合成器空间的 X 坐标。

y.name: Y Position
y.description: Last applied y position of this output in the global compositor space.
y.description[zh_CN]: 当前输出上次应用到全局合成器空间的 Y 坐标。

width.name: Width
width.description: Last committed output mode width in pixels. 0 means no output mode has been saved.
width.description[zh_CN]: 上次提交的输出模式宽度，单位为像素。0 表示未保存输出模式。

height.name: Height
height.description: Last committed output mode height in pixels. 0 means no output mode has been saved.
height.description[zh_CN]: 上次提交的输出模式高度，单位为像素。0 表示未保存输出模式。

refresh.name: Refresh Rate
refresh.description: Last committed output refresh rate in mHz. 0 means no output mode has been saved.
refresh.description[zh_CN]: 上次提交的输出刷新率，单位为 mHz。0 表示未保存输出模式。

transform.name: Transform
transform.description: Last committed wl_output_transform enum value for this output.
transform.description[zh_CN]: 当前输出上次提交的 wl_output_transform 枚举值。

scale.name: Scale
scale.description: Last committed output scale. Values must be greater than 0. The default value means no output mode has been saved.
scale.description[zh_CN]: 当前输出上次提交的缩放值，必须大于 0。默认值表示未保存输出模式。

adaptiveSyncEnabled.name: Adaptive Sync Enabled
adaptiveSyncEnabled.description: Whether adaptive sync was enabled in the last committed output state.
adaptiveSyncEnabled.description[zh_CN]: 当前输出上次提交的状态是否启用了自适应同步。
